title: The Big Cheese Ultra Power Block Bait Mouse Killer Kit - Twinpack, Refillable Bait Stations, 5x20g Brodifacoum Blocks, Rat and Mice Poisoning Blocks, Fast Acting, Biodegradable, Indoor and Outdoor Use
features: SINGLE-FEED: Kills rats and mice in one feed, ready-to-use fast acting bait technology

All-IN-ONE KIT: Includes two refillable corner-fit bait stations and 5x20g Brodifacoum blocks, For as long as bait is being consumed, replenish the station as directed using The Big Cheese Ultra Power Block Bait (STV567 and STV568)
TAMPER-RESISTANT: The design protects children and pets from contact with bait and is suitable to place in indoor areas such as kitchen cupboards, sheds, garages and outdoor areas
CORNER-FIT: Discreet unit with two-way entry with translucent inspection chamber
DAMP-PROOF: The moisture-resistant bait blocks stay fresh in both wet and dry weather conditions and are suitable for both indoor and outdoor use
INGREDIENTS: Specially designed with the highest quality food materials, flavours and preservatives, the bait is made using British grain
TESTED AND PROVEN: On-pack guarantee provided
POWERFUL: For big rodent problems, like the professionals use
description: From the manufacturer GUARANTEED EFFECTIVE RODENT CONTROL FOR BIG PEST PROBLEMS Bait & Kill: Our Ultra Power range offers the only true single-feed rodent poison available on the amateur market. The highly palatable formula contains a powerful active ingredient that delivers a lethal dose to rodents in just one feed. Catch & Kill: We offer a selection of versatile rodent trap solutions that are highly effective, with satisfaction guaranteed. Our powerful snap traps have been designed with durability in mind to be used again and again, whilst our innovative electronic products use smart-circuit technology to deliver a quick and humane kill. Pet-safe and child-safe options are available. Catch Alive: Safe for use around children and pets, these traps provide a humane, welfare-friendly alternative to lethal methods. Our professional-quality traps have been designed with safety in mind, both for the user and the target pest. Self-setting multi-catch mechanisms and fast-action closures allow for efficient rodent trapping and are ideal for large rodent infestations. Repel: 24/7 protection and peace of mind - our advanced mega-sonic repellers will protect your home around the clock, ridding your home of rodent pests and preventing their return. Poison-free and safe for use around children. Pack contains 5 ready-to-use blocks, 2 bait stations POWERFUL RODENT CONTROL Our ULTRA POWER Block Bait contains the most powerful poison available on the amateur market and KILLS RATS & MICE IN ONE FEED. With single-feed bait technology just like the professionals use, our Ultra Power range delivers high-performance rodent control with satisfaction guaranteed. We are so confident that you'll be impressed with our product range that we have made an on-pack pledge: Satisfaction Guaranteed! Rodent control just like the professionals use, ULTRA POWER is the solution for BIG PEST PROBLEMS. It is a legal requirement to use a bait station when baiting mice and rats. The Big Cheese Ultra Power Block Bait Mouse Killer Kit come with two tamper-resistant bait station and 5 x 20g Ultra Power Block Baits. Stations are refillable using The Big Cheese Ultra Power Block Bait purchased separately. Prior to treatment: Remove all known sources of food from the infested area. Treatment: Place 1 x 20g Ultra Power Block Bait in each bait station, and place where there are signs of rodent activity (fresh droppings, nests or burrows, runways and feeding places). Disposal of rodents: Rodents should be double-bagged using plastic bags and either disposed of in a household waste bin with a secure lid to prevent access of wildlife or pets, collected by a specialist waste contractor, or the local authority.
